title: conditionally limiting based on status
excerpt: Right now, all options of a Status field are shown 100% of the time (like at any time we can change an item’s Status to Not Started, In Progress, Completed, Escalated, etc.). We would like to limit which options are show…

posts.author: emdriskill (Emma Driskill)
posts.cookedHtml: Right now, all options of a Status field are shown 100% of the time (like at any time we can change an item’s Status to Not Started, In Progress, Completed, Escalated, etc.). We would like to limit which options are shown to the user depending on certain criteria. Each value could have a customizable set of conditions for it to show (like only offer Escalated when the item is in the “In Progress” Group-- otherwise, don’t even show Escalated in the list of Status options)

posts.author: clessard (Cameron Lessard)
posts.cookedHtml: Only seeing statuses that pertain to the current status would be an excellent improvement. The person who thought of this is a genius!
